zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury是Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP和Isabel Strange的兒子，於1369年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾。他於1397年與Lady Katherine Pabenham在英國諾薩普頓史爾騰福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年9月9日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury是Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP和Isabel Strange的儿子，于1369年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾。他于1397年与Lady Katherine Pabenham在英国諾薩普頓史爾騰福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年9月9日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury was born in 1369, in Buckinghamshire, England as the son of Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP and Isabel Strange. He married Lady Katherine Pabenham in 1397, in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury est né en 1369, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP et Isabel Strange. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Pabenham en 1397, à Thenford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury wurde 1369 in Buckinghamshire, England, als Sohn von Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP und Isabel Strange geboren. Er hat 1397 in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England Lady Katherine Pabenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1418 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury è nato il nel 1369 nel Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP e Isabel Strange. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Pabenham nel 1397, nel Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesburyは1369年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでSheriff John Aylesbury ,MPとIsabel Strangeの息子として生まれた。1397年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスエンフォードでLady Katherine Pabenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年9月9日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury(은)는 1369년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP(와)과 Isabel Strange의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1397년 영국 노르섬프토실르 테퍼드에서 Lady Katherine Pabenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury nasceu em 1369, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP e Isabel Strange. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine Pabenham em 1397, em Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Aylesbury родился в 1369 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sheriff John Aylesbury ,MP и Isabel Strange. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Pabenham в 1397 г. в местности тенфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Katherine Pabenham en 1397, en Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
